parents.subject: LU-19916 mgs: start MGS replicas on MDTs/OSTs

commit.subject: LU-19917 mgs: MGS replica IR support
commit.message:
LU-19917 mgs: MGS replica IR support

. update MGS replica nidtbl upon MGC notify
. enqueue IR on OSTs to support MGS replica on OST, though IR won't
  take effect, but it will notify MGS replica on the node
. update test script zconf_mount() to use MGS replicas and MGS0 for
  client mount

Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I44dd044575d525a13c5a11b5d514b0c44e23b485
